What was broken, missing, slow, confusing, or inconsistent before this change?

List the main areas touched by this PR.

-

## Public API Impact

Choose one:

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Adds public API
- [ ] Changes public API

## Documentation and Examples

Choose all that apply:

- [ ] No docs update needed
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Examples updated
- [ ] Changelog updated

If you updated docs/examples/changelog, briefly state what changed.

## Testing

Choose all that apply:

- [ ] Not run locally

Describe the verification steps and the most important covered scenarios.

## Checklist

- [ ] The title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] The PR is focused on one coherent user-facing goal
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests or examples where appropriate
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue
